Open-world generalisation to unseen household environments. Cleans an entirely new kitchen with no environment-specific training.
Deployed at major academic health systems. Inpatient + outpatient tools launched 2025. Altais physician-burnout partnership.
AWS Generative AI Competency. CXP unified platform launched Nov 2025.
AstraZeneca, Merck KGaA, Eli Lilly partners. Went private via Osaka Holdings merger in 2025.
500M facts, 70M directional relationships. Major pharma partners. Agentic layer launched early-access Mar 2025.
Hundreds of millions of users. Acquired Noam Shazeer team's tech (Google partnership).
Warner Bros (Justice League), Sky, BBC clients. £1M consortium funding (Sept 2024).
Launched July 30, 2025. Available to all logged-in ChatGPT users (Free, Plus, Pro, Team). Goal-setting and cross-conversation progress tracking marked as future work.
Dominant SMB market position.
1M users across 107 countries.
1B+ annual interactions. Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader 2025. Customers report 30% AHT reduction, 3× self-service.
15k+ developers. $5M seed. NVIDIA partnership at CES 2024. $6.5M revenue (2024).
Forrester Wave Leader, Conversation Intelligence Q2 2025.
Backed by OpenAI. ElevenLabs partnership for voice (2025).
5M oncology visits/year. 98.8 KLAS score (A+ all six categories, 2025 Emerging Company Spotlight). 4× monthly oncology visits YoY. Randomised clinical trial published.
~9% of 12.2M paid subscribers on Max by end-2025 (~1.1M users). 78% of Roleplay users reported better real-world conversation readiness in internal surveys.
Provenance chain throughout review session.
50M+ users in 200+ countries. $32.5M revenue 2023; $60M raised total.
900+ plaintiff firms at GA (2025). Auditor runs unprompted against full case inventory.
SOTA on humanoid logistics benchmarks (Scaling Helix paper).
$400M raised across two 2025 rounds (Insight, Accel, Halo). ~6k customers, 100k legal professionals.
Philanthropically funded (Eric Schmidt-backed). Autonomous gene-PCOS hypothesis claim.
ICCV 2025. Action-conditioned 3D video prediction; visual representation learning for imitation; neural simulator for model-based RL.
$190M ARR, 1,000+ customers at announcement.
$130M Series B (a16z, 2024). Centerview, Paul Weiss, Seyfarth.
KLAS 2025 Emerging Company Spotlight. ISO 27001 / SOC 2 / HIPAA / GDPR / NHS-DSP certified. Evidence product (Feb 2026) with HealthPathways / BMJ / NICE partnerships.

4.2T-param constellation of 22 LLMs (Polaris 3.0). 99.38% clinical accuracy. $404M total raised; Series C $126M at $3.5B valuation. UHS deployments; KPMG collab. Call duration 5.5 → 9.5 min; patient willingness to confide 88.9% → 94.6%.
Positioned as #1 AI agent for customer service.
Unity, Unreal, NVIDIA ACE integrations. $120M raised (Lightspeed, KP, Founders Fund, M12, Samsung NEXT).
Enterprise R&D positioning. Norway-based.
Matched physician decisions in 2/3 of real cases. Fine-tuned on Gemma 3 via Vertex AI. Live on Mayo Clinic Platform (May 2025); Northwell partnership; HBS case study.
2M students/educators/parents in 2024–25 school year. K–12 student usage 40k → 700k YoY (Khan Academy SY24-25 Annual Report).
Robotic wet-lab integration. London-based.
Voyage in open beta. AI Dungeon launched 2019 with millions of players.
Enterprise telco / finance / retail.
North America 127% YoY 2025. First eight-figure deal landed. $75M Series C (Point72).
~6M educators. 40% of US public schools. 13,000+ schools/districts in 160+ countries. 77% of teachers report significantly improved quality of life.
84.0% success on SimplerEnv. +26 percentage-point improvement over pi-0 on long-horizon tasks. ICLR 2026.
research ppl Academic/research use only
Demonstrated on physical robots.
Nabla $70M Series C (HV Capital); Navina $55M Series C (Goldman Sachs Alts).
Strongest memory architecture in companion segment.
Open foundation model. Generalises across quadrupeds, tabletop arms, mobile manipulators.
Outperforms LLM/VLM baselines on NaVQA across spatial, temporal, descriptive question types.
100% USMLE score. 35M peer-reviewed publications indexed.
Microsoft Dynamics 365 Contact Centre integration.

column2: Quizlet — AI Study Tools / Magic Notes
column4: 600M+ study sets created. Used by ~60% of US high school students.
500M+ minutes handled. 8/10 calls resolved autonomously. 30+ languages. Six-week deployment.
Millions of users globally. iOS / Android / Oculus VR.
Graph-checkpoint memory model.
Dominant CRM market position. Agentforce GA'd 2024.
110+ tasks in commercial deployment. ~40% of typical retail-store tasks covered. Task-onboarding reduced from weeks (2024) to <24h (Mar 2025).
1M+ classrooms in 80+ countries; 400+ district partnerships. Raised $25M April 2025.
Pre-classified citation intents — distinct from plain semantic search.
First zero-shot method to beat supervised baselines on MP3D. >10% success-rate improvement over prior zero-shot SOTA on MP3D, HM3D, RoboTHOR. NeurIPS 2024.

$100M ARR in seven quarters. $15.8B valuation after $950M raise (May 2026).
~$30M ARR within months of 2025 commercial launch. $1.4B raised at >$14B (Jan 2026).
Fortune 500 enterprise clients. Azure Marketplace.
10M+ users; doubling annually for five years. $78M Series C at $1B (Dec 2024); $100M revenue 2025.
$50M Series B (Khosla, Oct 2025). $350M post-money. ~$80M total funding.
Notable for narrative designer Emily Short's involvement.
Usage tripled in 2025; 400+ organizations; first ambient AI integrated with MEDITECH Expanse Document APIs; 80 languages.
On pace for $10M+ revenue 2025. Subscribed students up 4.5x YoY.
70k GPU-hours per training cycle. 1.5 PB fleet data from 4M+ vehicles.
5× lower synthetic-test rejection rate vs GAIA-2 (Wayve internal eval).
